title: What happened to the boys in the night?

meanings.usage: 指一片开阔的草地或农田
指露营时在野外生的火
形容事物非常好、令人愉快
过去式为crept，指无声地缓慢移动
露营时使用的保暖袋状寝具
指事物从无到有的出现
指水或其他液体的流动

examples.en: The boys put up their tent in the field.
examples.zh: 男孩们在田地里搭起了帐篷。

examples.en: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal.
examples.zh: 这件事一做完，他们就做饭了。

examples.en: They put out the fire and crept into their tent.
examples.zh: 他们熄灭营火然后爬进帐篷。

examples.en: Two boys woke up and began shouting.
examples.zh: 两个男孩醒来开始大喊。

examples.en: They leapt out of their sleeping bags.
The tent was full of water!

phrases.phrase: in the middle of the night

examples.en: In the middle of the night, two boys woke up.
examples.zh: 在半夜，两个男孩醒来了。

examples.en: The stream wound its way across the field.
They hurried outside to see what happened.
examples.zh: 他们匆忙跑出去看发生了什么。

examples.en: They told stories and sang songs by the campfire.
examples.zh: 他们在营火旁讲故事、唱歌。

grammar.title: 一般过去时 (Past Simple Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某个时间发生的动作或存在的状态
grammar.usage: 用于叙述过去发生的事情，描述一系列按时间顺序发生的动作

examples.en: The boys put up their tent in the field.
examples.zh: 男孩们在田地里搭起了帐篷。

examples.en: They cooked a meal over an open fire.

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某个时刻正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述在过去某一时刻正在发生的动作，常与过去进行时连用

examples.en: The stream was flowing under their tent.
examples.zh: 小溪正在帐篷下面流淌。

grammar.title: as soon as 引导的时间状语从句
grammar.definition: 表示主句动作紧跟在从句动作之后发生
grammar.structure: As soon as + 主语 + 动词..., 主语 + 动词...
grammar.usage: 强调两个动作紧接着发生，从句用一般过去时，主句也用一般过去时

examples.en: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal.
examples.zh: 这件事一做完，他们就做饭了。

examples.en: As soon as the rain stopped, they went out.

sentencePatterns.pattern: As soon as + 主语 + 动词(过去式)..., 主语 + 动词(过去式)...

original.en: As soon as this was done, they cooked a meal over an open fire.
original.zh: 这件事一做完，他们就在篝火上做了饭。

imitations.en: As soon as the class was over, we went to the library.
imitations.zh: 下课一结束，我们就去了图书馆。

imitations.en: As soon as he arrived, he called his mother.
imitations.zh: 他一到达就给妈妈打了电话。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词 + 时间/地点 + and then + 动词...

original.en: They put out the fire and crept into their tent.
original.zh: 他们熄灭营火然后爬进帐篷。

imitations.en: He finished his homework and then watched TV.
imitations.zh: 他写完作业然后看了电视。

imitations.en: She bought some food and then went home.
imitations.zh: 她买了些食物然后回家了。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + be动词 + 形容词 + and + 主语 + 动词(过去式) + 副词

original.en: Their sleeping bags were warm and comfortable, so they all slept soundly.
original.zh: 他们的睡袋既暖和又舒适，所以他们睡得很香。

imitations.en: The room was clean and tidy, so we felt comfortable.
imitations.zh: 房间干净整洁，所以我们感到很舒服。

imitations.en: The food was delicious and hot, so we ate a lot.
imitations.zh: 食物美味又热乎，所以我们吃了很多。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + 动词 + 介词短语 + and then + 动词 + 介词短语

original.en: The stream wound its way across the field and then flowed right under their tent.
original.zh: 小溪蜿蜒穿过田野，然后正好从他们帐篷下面流过。

imitations.en: The road winds its way through the mountains and then reaches the village.
imitations.zh: 道路蜿蜒穿过群山，然后到达村庄。

imitations.en: The river flows through the city and then enters the sea.
imitations.zh: 河流流经城市，然后汇入大海。
